name_en: Top-tier replica M25160 Black Creative Director Nicolas Ghesquière pays tribute to the brand's traditional hard suitcases with this elegant Side Trunk medium bag. The grained calfskin body features smooth calfskin trim, S-lock, and metal-look rounded corners. The handle and adjustable shoulder strap are detachable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody use. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 6 cm
